color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Container: Flutter WebApp
Technology: Flutter Web
Responsibility: UI moderna para jogos, palpites, ranking e perfil.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Container: Backend API
Technology: Java 21, Spring Boot
Responsibility: Endpoints REST, regras de negocio, seguranca e orquestracao.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Container: Result Sync Scheduler
Technology: Spring Scheduler
Responsibility: Importar resultados oficiais e disparar recalculo de pontuacao/ranking.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Container: Ranking Materialization
Technology: PostgreSQL Materialized View
Responsibility: Fornecer ranking performatico com desempate deterministico.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Container: Modulo de Autenticacao existente
Technology: Spring Security + JWT/Refresh
Responsibility: Login, emissao/validacao de token, MFA.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Container: PostgreSQL (Supabase MCP)
Technology: PostgreSQLDialect
Responsibility: Persistencia transacional e consultas.

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Business Rule: Desempate Ranking
1 total_pontos DESC
2 total_acertos_exatos DESC
3 primeiro_palpite_em ASC
